title: ヘルプ！　テスト前パニック

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I meet Grass Wonder at her classroom to take her
to training.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh my... Thank you for coming all this way.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But may I ask to be excused from training for
today?
choice_data_list: Are you feeling under the weather?
Are you feeling under the weather?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well, no. I'm perfectly healthy, it's just—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Hey, Grass! Can you help me figure out what
this Classical Japanese poem means?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ah! No fair! I was gonna ask her an English
question!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Just a moment. I'll be right there.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Trainer. But you can see how I'm
needed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder gives an apologetic bow before
going back inside the classroom.
